🏭 About Us

India's Trusted Name in Home Furnishing

Founded in Noida, Kashvi Furnishing has been crafting premium home essentials for over 5 years. From stylish table covers to luxurious bath towels, every product is designed with one goal — to make your home more beautiful, practical, and comfortable.

We work directly with manufacturers across India to bring you the best quality at the fairest prices. Our CarryMe Store is our direct-to-customer platform — no middlemen, just great products and honest prices.

🏭 Direct from Factory No middlemen — better quality at lower prices
🧵 Premium Materials Curated fabrics, tested for durability & softness
🚚 Pan-India Delivery Fast shipping from our Noida warehouse
🤝 Dealer Friendly Special pricing for retailers & bulk orders
✅ GST Registered 📦 HSN: 39201011 🇮🇳 Made in India 🔒 Secure Payments
